calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-16-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Continued To Jan-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel, via Zoom, for Jefferie Jones, Petitioner; Deb Fox, via Zoom, Guardian Ad Litem (GAL), for Adrienne Hall.

The court confirms with Ms. Fox that she supports Mr. Jones' appointment as Administrator. Ms. Fox reports regarding her plans as GAL for Adrienne Hall and to adequately support Ms. Hall's best interests during the administration. Ms. Fox advises that she intends to explore for the best option to distribute Ms. Hall's share of the estate. Ms. Fox advises that she does not believe that Ms. Hall has been moved from Laguna Honda. After additional discussion, the court notes that there are no appearances to object to this petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Jefferie Jones is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $185,000. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-08-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Continued To Jul-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Petition For Appointment Of A Guardian Ad Litem
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Continued To Jun-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel, via Zoom, for Jefferie Jones, Petitioner.

Mr. Wrobel confirms that Adrienne is a patient at Laguna Honda but is uncertain as to her capacity. The Court expresses its concern about proceeding without first confirming her capacity and that a petition for appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem may be required.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jun-28-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status on Petition for Appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-26-2022 Continued To May-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
